heading: Interest; partial payment of claims
label: 2705 Interest; partial payment of claims

children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: The responsible party or the responsible party’s guarantor is liable to a claimant for interest on the amount paid in satisfaction of a claim under this Act for the period described in subsection (b). The responsible party shall establish a procedure for the payment or settlement of claims for interim, short-term damages. Payment or settlement of a claim for interim, short-term damages representing less than the full amount of damages to which the claimant ultimately may be entitled shall not preclude recovery by the claimant for damages not reflected in the paid or settled partial claim.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), the period for which interest shall be paid is the period beginning on the 30th day following the date on which the claim is presented to the responsible party or guarantor and ending on the date on which the claim is paid.

children.heading: Exclusion of period due to offer by guarantor
children.label: 2 Exclusion of period due to offer by guarantor
children.text: If the guarantor offers to the claimant an amount equal to or greater than that finally paid in satisfaction of the claim, the period described in paragraph (1) does not include the period beginning on the date the offer is made and ending on the date the offer is accepted. If the offer is made within 60 days after the date on which the claim is presented under , the period described in paragraph (1) does not include any period before the offer is accepted.section 2713(a) of this title

children.heading: Exclusion of periods in interests of justice
children.label: 3 Exclusion of periods in interests of justice
children.text: If in any period a claimant is not paid due to reasons beyond the control of the responsible party or because it would not serve the interests of justice, no interest shall accrue under this section during that period.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The interest paid for claims, other than Federal Government cost recovery claims, under this section shall be calculated at the average of the highest rate for commercial and finance company paper of maturities of 180 days or less obtaining on each of the days included within the period for which interest must be paid to the claimant, as published in the Federal Reserve Bulletin.

children.heading: Federal cost recovery claims
children.label: B Federal cost recovery claims
children.text: The interest paid for Federal Government cost recovery claims under this section shall be calculated in accordance with .section 3717 of title 31

children.heading: Interest not subject to liability limits
children.label: 5 Interest not subject to liability limits

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Interest (including prejudgment interest) under this paragraph is in addition to damages and removal costs for which claims may be asserted under and shall be paid without regard to any limitation of liability under .section 2702 of this titlesection 2704 of this title

children.heading: Payment by guarantor
children.label: B Payment by guarantor
children.text: The payment of interest under this subsection by a guarantor is subject to section 2716(f).1See References in Text note below.1
